UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLUSTRIX, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THEWAY HOLDINGS LLC $60,000.04 PRINCIPAL, $2,041.65 INTEREST, $615.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $62,656.69, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17052013)
